mapper.select: Select ElmItemID From XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST Where ElmInstNo = #{ElmInstNo}
Select ProcessID From XBOLTAPP.PIM_PROC_INST Where ProcInstNo = #{ProcInstNo}
Select TM.URL From XBOLTAPP.PIM_ITEM_MENU TIMA Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_Menu TM ON TM.MenuID = TIMA.MenuID WHERE TIMA.ItemID = #{itemID} AND TIMA.MNLVL = 1

SELECT Row_Number() OVER (Order By TPI.CreationTime) AS RNUM , TPI.ProcInstanceID , TPI.ProcInstNo , TPI.ProcessID , TOA.Value AS ProcInstanceName , ISNULL(TM.Name,'') AS OwnerName , ISNULL(TEAM.Name,'') AS OwnerTeamName , CONVERT(VARCHAR, TPI.CreationTime, 111) AS CreationTime , CONVERT(VARCHAR, TPI.StartTime, 111) AS StartDate , CONVERT(VARCHAR, TPI.EndTime, 111) AS EndDate , CONVERT(VARCHAR, TPI.DueDate, 111) AS DueDate , ISNULL(TD.Name,'') AS StatusNM , TOA.InstanceClass FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_PROC_INST TPI Left Outer join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TPI.OwnerID = TM.MemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TEAM ON TEAM.TeamID = TPI.OwnerTeamID And TEAM.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.PIM_INSTANCE_ATTR TOA ON TPI.ProcInstNo = TOA.instanceNo AND TOA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT01001' And TOA.InstanceClass = 'PROC' And LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TPI.Status = TD.TypeCode AND TD.Category = 'PROCSTS' AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE 1=1
And TOA.Value like '%'+#{instanceName}+'%'

SELECT '' AS P_TREE_ID, TXPI.ProcInstNo AS TREE_ID, TIA.PlainText AS TREE_NM, CONVERT(VARCHAR,(SELECT MIN(ReqStartDate) FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST WHERE ProcInstNo = TXPI.ProcInstNo),112) AS ReqStartDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR,(SELECT MIN(ReqStartDate) FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST WHERE ProcInstNo = TXPI.ProcInstNo),105) AS ViewStartTime, CONVERT(VARCHAR,(SELECT MAX(ReqDueDate) FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST WHERE ProcInstNo = TXPI.ProcInstNo),112) AS ReqDueDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR,(SELECT MAX(ReqDueDate) FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST WHERE ProcInstNo = TXPI.ProcInstNo),105) AS ViewEndTime, '' as PreElmInstNo, '' as ParentInstNo, '' AS ClassCode FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_PROC_INST TXPI Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TXPI.ProcessID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE TXPI.ProcInstNo = #{ProcInstNo} UNION ALL SELECT ISNULL(TXSI.ParentElmInstNo, ProcInstNo) AS P_TREE_ID, TXSI.ElmInstNo AS TREE_ID, ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,TXIA.Value) AS TREE_NM, CONVERT(VARCHAR,ISNULL(TXSI.ReqStartDate,(SELECT MIN(ReqStartDate) FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST WHERE ParentElmInstNo = TXSI.ElmInstNo)),112) AS ReqStartDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR,ISNULL(TXSI.ReqStartDate,(SELECT MIN(ReqStartDate) FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST WHERE ParentElmInstNo = TXSI.ElmInstNo)),105) AS ViewStartTime, CONVERT(VARCHAR,ISNULL(TXSI.ReqDueDate,(SELECT MAX(ReqDueDate) FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST WHERE ParentElmInstNo = TXSI.ElmInstNo)),112) AS ReqDueDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR,ISNULL(TXSI.ReqDueDate,(SELECT MAX(ReqDueDate) FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST WHERE ParentElmInstNo = TXSI.ElmInstNo)),105) AS ViewEndTime, TXSI.PreElmInstNo, TXSI.ParentElmInstNo, TI.ClassCode FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST TXSI Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TXSI.ElmItemID And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTAPP.PIM_INSTANCE_ATTR TXIA ON TXIA.instanceNo = TXSI.ElmInstNo And TXIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT01001' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TI ON TXSI.ElmItemID = TI.ItemID WHERE TXSI.ProcInstNo = #{ProcInstNo}

SELECT FromItemID, ToItemID ,Identifier FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ToItemID in ( SELECT Items FROM XBOLTADM.fn_Split( (SELECT XBOLTPIM.fn_GetWbsChildrenList(#{wbsItemID}, #{rootItemID}, 0)),',') ) AND ItemTypeCode in ( SELECT ConTypeCode FROM xboltadm.tb_arc_filter WHERE RootItemID = #{rootItemID}) ORDER BY identifier
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(ElmInstNo), 'E000000000') AS MaxElmInstID FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST Where ElmInstNo like 'E%'
SELECT TOP 1 FromItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE ToItemID = #{wbsItemID} AND CategoryCode = 'ST1'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_ELM_INST WHERE ElmInstNo = #{ElmInstNo}
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(ProcInstNo), 'P000000000') AS MaxProcInstID FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_PROC_INST Where ProcInstNo like 'P%'
